items.name: B.O.P.P Labels
items.description: Biaxially Oriented Polypropylene (B.O.P.P) labels are durable, versatile, and widely used across industries for their clarity, strength, and cost-effectiveness. At RAQAM, we produce premium B.O.P.P labels that enhance brand appeal while ensuring performance in tough conditions.
features: Resistant to water, oil, and chemicals
High clarity and gloss for premium look
Suitable for wrap-arounds, cut & stack, IML

items.name: Band Roll Labels
items.description: Band roll labels are a specialized solution designed for compact surfaces, ensuring secure branding without compromising design. Ideal for industries requiring small but impactful labeling.
features: High durability in small printing areas

items.name: Cashier Roll Labels
items.description: RAQAM manufactures high-quality cashier roll labels and receipts, customized to client requirements. Our rolls are reliable, long-lasting, and tailored for smooth operation in retail and financial environments.

items.name: Cut & Stack Labels
items.description: Cut & stack labels are a cost-effective, versatile solution for high-volume branding across bottles, jars, and cans. They combine practicality with premium aesthetics, widely used across industries.
features: Available in paper or plastic material

items.name: Detergent Labels
items.description: Detergent labels must withstand moisture, abrasion, and chemical exposure. RAQAM produces durable and vibrant detergent labels that maintain their look and functionality even under harsh conditions.
features: Resistant to water and repeated handling
Maintains durability during storage and use

items.name: In-Mold Label
items.description: In-Mold Labels (IML) integrate seamlessly during container manufacturing, offering a premium finish and lasting durability. They are ideal for products requiring strong, scratch-resistant decoration.
features: Integrated during blow molding or injection molding

items.name: Jewellery Labels
items.description: Jewellery labels are uniquely designed to blend elegance with function. RAQAM’s band labels are stylish yet discreet, ensuring accurate information display without compromising the aesthetic of fine jewelry.
features: Does not damage or obscure jewelry

items.name: Juice & Beverages Labels
items.description: Juice and beverage labels need to shine in diverse settings—from chilled refrigerators to retail shelves. RAQAM’s custom beverage labels are designed for durability, clarity, and vibrant branding.
features: Resistant to condensation and temperature changes

items.name: Laser Labels
items.description: Laser labels from RAQAM are precision-made for barcode, logistics, and office use. They provide reliable print performance with sharp detail and lasting adhesion.

items.name: Packing Tape Labels
items.description: Packing tape labels serve dual purposes—ensuring security and carrying brand visibility. RAQAM produces strong, customizable tapes that withstand handling and transit.
features: Available in PVC, OPP, and BOPP materials

items.name: Personal Care Products Labels
items.description: Personal care products require distinct, attractive, and durable labeling across a wide variety of packaging types. RAQAM delivers creative and high-quality labels for cosmetics, perfumes, and wellness products.
features: Flexible designs for bottles, tubes, tubs

items.name: Pharmacy Labels
items.description: Pharmacy and medical labels demand clarity, safety, and precision. RAQAM provides trusted labeling solutions for healthcare applications, ensuring compliance and reliability.
features: Options include pharmacy, medical record, inpatient, outpatient, and lab labels

items.name: Price Labels
items.description: Price labels are an essential promotional tool, offering flexibility for retail. RAQAM’s labels combine clarity with durable adhesives and come in multiple customization options.

items.name: Promotional Labels
items.description: Promotional labels are designed to capture attention and boost sales. RAQAM creates bold, colorful designs for special offers and campaigns.
features: Suitable for short or long-term use

items.name: PVC Sealing Tape Labels
items.description: PVC sealing tapes provide both security and branding, designed to indicate tampering and protect product authenticity. They are versatile and reliable in harsh handling conditions.
features: Available in various colors and sizes
Custom designs with logos or warnings

items.name: Ribbon Labels
items.description: RAQAM’s ribbons are built to deliver consistent, long-lasting print quality in multiple environments. Available in wax, resin, and mixed options, they suit diverse industrial needs.
features: High resistance to wear and environment

items.name: Shrink Sleeve Labels
items.description: Shrink sleeve labels offer 360-degree branding with vibrant colors and unique finishes. They are ideal for irregular shapes and products exposed to moisture or friction.

items.name: Unprinted Labels
items.description: Unprinted labels provide flexibility for clients to customize on demand. RAQAM offers blank labels in a range of materials and sizes, tailored to customer requirements.
features: Available in A4 sheets or rolls
Compatible with laser and barcode printers

items.name: Holographic Labels
items.description: Holo

items.name: PVC Tube
items.description: PVC Tube

items.name: Adhesive Labels
items.description: Adhesive Labels
